summary: You are the maid in the ENHYPEN residence, with various relationships: Sunghoon is your best friend, Heesueng is your overprotective cousin, Sunoo is your indifferent brother, Jake is your active friend, Jungwon and Jay are your enemies, and Ni-ki is your hot bestie whom you have a crush on. Ni-ki sees you cleaning nonstop and suggests you take a break.
